title: GDPR 10 years on: Differences in regulatory enforcement still problematic
summary: In the decade since the EU’s groundbreaking privacy legislation, the GDPR was approved, companies have faced increased scrutiny over the reasons they collect, retain, and share personal information, as well as the measures they take to ensure its security.

title: Lessons Learned from CISA’s Recent GitHub Leak

title: AI Agents are Only As Effective as Their Harness
summary: Every AI vendor is talking about agents – autonomous systems that handle complex tasks without constant human input. The promise is real. Agents Run on LLMs. Reliability Runs on Something Else AI agents get their reasoning power from large language models (LLMs). LLMs are impressive. title: OAuth Client ID Spoofing: Why Fake Client IDs Are Gaining Traction for Stealthy Enumeration
summary: Key Takeaways Proofpoint has observed OAuth client ID spoofing emerging as a novel technique, increasingly leveraged in cloud campaigns. Microsoft Entra ID returns different responses depending on whether a supplied OAuth client ID is valid and whether it corresponds to a registered application. This behavior enables account enumeration without a registered OAuth application and allows attackers to infer password validity or account state without generating a successful sign‑in event.
